Let $P(z) = z^8 + \left(4\sqrt{3} + 6\right)z^4 - \left(4\sqrt{3} + 7\right)$. What is the minimum perimeter among all the $8$-sided polygons in the complex plane whose vertices are precisely the zeros of $P(z)$?

Let $x > y > z > 0$ be real numbers.  Find the minimum value of
\[x + \frac{108}{(x - y)^3 (y - z)^2 z}.\]

The average of Amy's, Ben's, and Chris's ages is 6. Four years ago,  Chris was the same age as Amy is now. In four years, Ben's age will be $\frac{3}{5}$ of Amy's age at that time. How many years old is Chris now?
If $\sqrt{2\sqrt{t-2}} = \sqrt[4]{7 - t}$, then find $t$.
